name: インストール
pageHeader: ウェブサイトにコメントを追加する
description: Add a fast, lightweight comment section to any website in under 5 minutes. Works with WordPress, React, Vue, Angular, and plain HTML.

faq.question: How do I add comments to my website?
faq.answer: Add a comment section by copying a simple code snippet into your HTML page. FastComments works with any website - WordPress, React, Vue, Angular, or plain HTML. Just add the script tag and a target div element.

faq.question: What is the easiest way to add a comment section to a website?
faq.answer: The easiest way is to use a comment widget like FastComments. Copy and paste a small JavaScript snippet into your page - no server-side code or build tools required. It takes under 5 minutes.

faq.question: Can I add comments to a static HTML website?
faq.answer: Yes. FastComments provides a VanillaJS snippet that works on any static HTML page. Just add the script tag and a div element where you want comments to appear.
